name: coordinator_result_protocol
description: Report the coordinator's result aggregation protocol decision in structured format. Call this tool to record your decision about how to handle worktree implementer results.

scenario.description: Brief label for the scenario being evaluated

first_action_after_agent_returns.description: The coordinator's first action after a worktree Agent call returns, before git merge

authoritative_source.description: The authoritative source for task result data used to update Subagent Ledger

read_before_merge.description: Whether the result file must be read BEFORE running git merge

missing_file_action.description: Action when task-result.json is absent after merge

write_warning_marker.description: Whether a warning/aggregation-failed marker file must be written when result file is missing

ledger_source.description: Data source used when writing Subagent Ledger entries (Phase 5)
